title: Add a necklace to Stitch character in the 3D scene

requirements.text: Add a 3D necklace accessory to the Stitch character in FrogScene.tsx. The necklace should be rendered as a 3D geometry (a chain or band looping around the neck, with a small pendant or bead element) positioned correctly around Stitch's neck, matching his cartoon proportions and color palette (e.g., gold or dark metallic tones).
acceptanceCriteria: A necklace geometry is visible around Stitch's neck in the 3D scene
The necklace consists of at least a looping band or chain element around the neck and a small pendant or decorative element
The necklace is correctly positioned relative to Stitch's neck and scales appropriately with the character
The necklace color/material fits Stitch's cartoon aesthetic (e.g., gold, silver, or matching palette)
The necklace does not clip through or obscure Stitch's face or body in a distracting way
The necklace moves with Stitch during animations (jump/squash-stretch)

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All necklace geometry must be implemented as 3D React Three Fiber components within FrogScene.tsx, consistent with the existing StitchGlasses sub-component pattern
nonGoals: Adding a necklace to the Angel character
Adding any other new accessories beyond the necklace
